lane: ground-synth (the spec-compiler's GROUND + SYNTH half — COMPOSITIONS ⑦)
how_verified: BY USE against the resident chat-4b (8GB, `company gpu` confirmed resident). (1) FRESH-DISCOVER: `RoleRegistry().discover(['roles'])` + a fresh `Suite(...)` both bring ground_criterion + triad_synth live from disk (no commit, no MCP-server rediscover needed) with correct facets — ground_criterion: fireable, op=generate, mode_scope={'spec'} (in the spec cast: ['decompose_seed','expand_criterion','ground_criterion']), input_addresses=('utterance',); triad_synth: fireable, op=generate, NO mode_scope (in NO cast — reduce-role fired directly), input_addresses=('notes',). (2) GROUND-CHECK by use: `run_items(ground_criterion, [reuse-criterion, net-new-criterion])` over 2 mock criteria → 2 schema-validated GroundCriterionOut verdicts: the reuse criterion (built on run_reduce) → grounded='reuse', cite='runtime/cognition.py:run_reduce' (a REAL file:symbol, high-confidence note); the net-new criterion (live-embedder retrieve, unbuilt) → grounded='net-new', cite='' (honest, no fabrication). NO-FICTION held in both directions — in an earlier run the 4B even REFUSED to cite an ambiguous reuse and returned net-new, the desired safety. (3) SYNTH by use: `run_reduce(grounded-addresses, mode='role', role=triad_synth, max_tokens=2200)` → {completion_criteria, implementation_guide, research_synthesis}, all three non-empty markdown bodies in the build-prep house style (GROUP headings, two-faced FUNCTION/FORM, honest status, reuse seam); the research_synthesis assembles the reuse-map for the two inputs (A1→reuse w/ cite, A2→net-new) — 'synthesis = the reduce of 2c'. HONEST-STATUS on the draft: the 4B at 2200 tokens also INVENTED two extra entries (B1 'State Preservation', B2 'Embedder Context') NOT present in the two inputs. This is within the 'advisory DRAFT, I/Tim refine' frame and is NOT a role defect — triad_synth is generative synthesis, not a grounding verdict; the NO-FICTION guarantee lives in ground_criterion (which held exactly, fabricating no cite). The synth draft is rough model-quality on a small model and over-generated beyond its inputs; refined downstream (the ⑦ floor: a draft, never a build off an unconfirmed compiled spec). (4) FLOOR: tests/cognition_governance_acceptance.py 42/42 PASS (resolve/dispatch floor unforgeable from cognition; roles run only inside run_role with non-consequential effects); a grep of both files for dispatch_decision|claude -p|approve(|resolve(|subprocess|os.system finds ONLY the floor-declaration comments (what the role does NOT do), no actual calls. (5) roles_acceptance.py: all floor/cast/jury/binding/schema checks PASS; the ONLY red is the drift-home-not-updated check — 'drift: [decompose_seed, expand_criterion, ground_criterion, triad_synth]'. The discriminating fact (the bar the task encodes): ALL FOUR reds are the SAME KIND (drift-home not yet reflecting the role) and ZERO floor/schema/cast/binding reds exist. The extra two ids (decompose_seed, expand_criterion) are the MAP lane's files — evidence: my start-of-session `ls` showed neither existed; they later appeared in the 'spec' cast; `git status` shows both as `??` untracked (not mine). The drift home roles/AGENTS.md is the next beat's job, off-limits this lane, so leaving it unedited is correct — roles_acceptance goes green once that mechanical reflection lands. (Note: the test raises a Python AssertionError on the drift line; I read the traceback directly — do not read an `EXIT=0` from a piped `tail` as a pass signal.)
needs_tim: None for this lane. The drift-home reflection (roles/AGENTS.md entries for ground_criterion + triad_synth) is the next beat's mechanical update — roles_acceptance.py will go green once it lands. Downstream of ⑦ (NOT this lane): the EXPAND step (decompose_seed/expand_criterion, the MAP lane) feeds the criterion units; the CONFIRM jury (covers-the-seed? any reuse-claim unverifiable?) is a separate draws:N jury; the corpus-grounded `corpus_slice` retrieve is a FUTURE bge-m3 embedder-window enhancement (① the repo exocortex) — ground_criterion degrades cleanly to 'name the file you believe + state confidence in note' without it, as exercised by use.
notes: FILE-DISJOINT respected: wrote ONLY roles/ground_criterion.py + roles/triad_synth.py; did NOT touch the MAP lane's roles (decompose_seed/expand_criterion), reduce_synth.py/verify_lens.py (read-only refs), roles/AGENTS.md, runtime/*, or mcp_face/*. Nothing committed. MIRRORS: ground_criterion mirrors verify_lens.py (single-generate run_items-fanned MAP, lens/criterion rides in the unit at ctx['utterance'], DEFAULT input_addresses=('utterance',), NOT a draws-jury) + register_element.py (the run_items MAP fan + nested-grounding shape); triad_synth mirrors reduce_synth.py + score_options.py EXACTLY (reduce-role, op=generate, input_addresses=('notes',) labelled-compose path, declared reduce rule in `rules`, fired via run_reduce(mode='role'), in NO cast). KEY DESIGN CATCHES (advisor-confirmed): triad_synth carries NO mode_scope while ground_criterion carries {'spec'} — the MAP carries the cast, the REDUCE is fired directly (its ('notes',) axis would fail-loud if a cast auto-fired it as a swarm role); grounded is a closed Literal['reuse','net-new'] + cite default '' (exact-token downstream, like verify_lens's verdict); the by-use run_reduce passes a generous max_tokens (2200) because three markdown docs exceed the 512 default → truncation → fail-loud JSON-parse failure (never silent). REGISTRY-IS-TRUTH proof seen by use: the 'spec' cast already contained the MAP lane's decompose_seed/expand_criterion — ground_criterion joined them with no driver/suite/UI change.
